eb_skip_pair_ablation.hidden_not_badly_degraded_threshold: skip hidden_t2 mmd_rbf and sliced_w2 <= 1.2x shared_adjacent_only_6000
eb_skip_pair_ablation.recommended_main_text_claim: skip pairs do not provide stable benefit under current coupling/budget

summary.subset_rule: A549 only; compounds with LINCS SMILES, doses 10/100/1000/10000 nM, >=200 cells per compound-dose; sorted by compound name; first 8 compounds; at most 250 cells per compound-dose and 250 vehicle cells sampled with fixed seed.

section_5_1_main_suite.claim_boundary: shared field improves hidden-time recovery; weighted skip supervision improves seen endpoint long-horizon rollout but may degrade hidden-time recovery, so skip is a long-horizon endpoint constraint rather than a uniformly better dynamics model.
section_5_1_main_suite.figure_5_1_redrawn_error_bars: Quantitative panels use mean +/- SEM across seed-level rows from tab_5_1_main_suite.csv and tab_5_1_main_suite_diag.csv.

figure_5_1_redrawn_panel_sources.source_table: adjacent_pairs and skip_pairs defined in this notebook; figure shows three main-text methods

seen_t4_long_horizon.note: Computed from mean values in tab_5_1_main_suite_summary.csv.
Computed from mean values in tab_5_1_main_suite_summary.csv.

velocity_jump_diagnostic.interpretation: Pairwise local bridges show large hand-off jumps; shared fields reduce average hand-off jump, with skip variants strongest at the late hand-off depending on sampling. This is a hand-off velocity discontinuity diagnostic, not proof that learned dynamics are more biologically faithful.
